claim: The belief a reader reserves for an as-yet-unseen atom should track the recent RATE of newcomers, so the SAME genuine newcomer is less surprising after a burst of newcomers than after a long stable stretch.
basis: Each item lays down prior context, then a genuine newcomer arrives AT `cursor`. Items differ only in the recent rate of newcomers before the cursor; within a modality every item has the SAME number of units, so total decayed mass at the cursor is matched. A reader whose reserve is a hand-set constant is blind to the recent novelty rate; one whose reserve tracks the signal is not. The channels are read causally — each item sees only the units before its cursor.
